message:
style: apply rustfmt formatting to asupersync binary and gf256 module

Minor formatting adjustments for consistency:
- asupersync.rs: reformat writeln! macro call to standard multi-line style
- gf256.rs: break long assert_eq! and if-let lines across multiple lines,
  and collapse an unnecessary line break in a single-line let binding

No behavioral changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
